data: Easy Vegetable Stir-Fry: Whisk 1/2 cup soy sauce, 1/4 cup vegetable broth, 2 tbsp honey, and 1 tbsp cornstarch in a bowl. Heat 2 tbsp sesame oil in a large wok over high heat. Toss in 2 cups broccoli florets, 1 sliced bell pepper, 1 cup snap peas, and 1 sliced carrot. Cook for 5 minutes until tender-crisp. Pour sauce over veggies and stir until thick.
